cozyverse.name: Puddle & Pip Cozyverse
cozyverse.description: A soft plush forest world of cozy adventures.

astromochi.name: The AstroMochi Crew
astromochi.description: Squishy space adventures across candy planets.

ninegates.name: Nine Gates Mahjong Kingdom
ninegates.description: Jade dragons, mahjong tiles and lantern festivals.

snackstreet.name: SnackStreet Squad
snackstreet.description: Neon street-food heroes, cooking rushes and scooter chaos.

oracle.name: Oracle Mirror Oddities
oracle.description: Mystical carnival magic with moon cats and tarot towers.

standalone.name: Mochi Mango Originals
standalone.description: One-off mascot games built for quick fun and merch.

retroverse.name: Mochi Mango Retroverse
retroverse.description: A neon-CRT universe celebrating three decades of arcade and home-game mechanics through new mascots, worlds, and stories.

tabletop-kingdom.name: Tabletop Kingdom
tabletop-kingdom.description: Wooden boards, carved pieces and classic strategy games reimagined with storybook charm.

puzzle-realm.name: Puzzle Realm
puzzle-realm.description: A kingdom of logic, memory, and wit — where every challenge sharpens the mind and rewards clever thinking.

candy-galaxy.name: Candy Galaxy
candy-galaxy.description: A sugary universe where every star is a candy and every planet is a dessert waiting to be explored.

mango-island.name: Mango Island
mango-island.description: A tropical paradise of sun, sand, and fruity fun — where every wave brings a new game and every palm hides a challenge.

mochi-world.name: Mochi World
mochi-world.description: A squishy, sweet universe where everything is made of mochi — from the clouds to the mountains to the friends you make along the way.
